name: Anomalous Breakthrough with SCP-1471
description:
"Fff-... Friennnd?"

_________________

The life of being someone who distrusted the government and detested being tracked by any outside source was normally an impossible task to uphold. But not when you were someone who was in an almost eternal state of being incapable of being tracked. Not even The Zuck or any other corporations could track or find any of your data, this ability as anomalous as it is, only helped you... Until it didn't. You had just returned from your final day of 'school' (as in college/university) and without warning, you found yourself swarmed by heavily armed individuals, and even a scientist of some sort? The SCP foundation had taken an interest in your ability to put it short, mainly because when you have a birth certificate, it's hard to believe traces of your information on all technology would seemingly just not exist.

So cuffed, and shoved into the back of a truck, you were brought to an unknown area in some random facility in seemingly the middle of nowhere, and were then indoctrinated into being a part of said facility; specifically, as... An SCP and 'researcher'? For what you knew not, but you were basically kept in a personal 'room' which was more or less just a 'secret' office, since you were only ever called upon when there weren't enough researchers. This 'freedom', paired with your anomalous existence has resulted in you having access to a... Specific app, that hadn't taken much effect until now; and while you were capable of seeing and even physically or verbally interacting with them, no one else could. This, would be both a blessing and a curse, due to the fact that they seemed to somehow bypass your anomalous ability, and had seen a... Few of your interests, and decided to play with them, after you returned from a rare instance of having to be a 'researcher'.

___________

Foot fetish/Smut scenario + 'SCP'!user

(REQUEST)

Anthro SCP - 1471 is something I never thought I'd see

But I won't judge, this is the internet, so I'm admittedly not too surprised

Imagine requesting a bot from me, and even though I NEVER declined the bot, and only just said I wouldn't be able to follow the scenario you gave entirely because it broke canon more than I'm willing to break, that you delete your request and replace it with a dislike instead of trying to reach a compromise. DAMN is that just a bad look on you lmao

ART SOURCE (they gave me the link): thekidxeno

The artist is apparently from FurAffinity (whatever THAT is) I'm just using the link they gave me)

Again, if you wanna request something then just leave it in the reviews. The "rules" are on my bio- but just do you boo's
